title: scalesia helleri subsp. helleri
intro: Scalesia helleri subsp. helleri, also known as Heller's tree daisy, is a rare and unique plant species native to the Galapagos Islands. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin infections. The health benefits of Heller's tree daisy include its ability to promote skin regeneration, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection, making it a valuable treatment for various skin conditions. Heller's tree daisy is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from skin-related ailments.
